steps.title: Look for wide variation
steps.content: The sentence needs an example showing that participants' judgments changed greatly depending on the occupation. A strong example should compare two occupations with very different ratings.

steps.title: Choose the strongest contrast
steps.content: The tour guide and surgeon comparison shows a large gap in likely ratings, directly illustrating variation by occupation. A and D stay within one occupation, and B highlights equal neutral percentages instead of variation. The answer is C.
